binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
PowerShell Post-Exploitation Framework
PowerSploit is a series of Microsoft PowerShell scripts
that can be used in post-exploitation scenarios during
authorized penetration tests.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use powersploit because ### powersploit.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair powersploit with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `powersploit --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web, wifi_6_ghz] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### powersploit.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install powersploit
Install with: sudo apt install powersploit
